series_metadata.series_title: Medicaid Health Insurance Portability and Accountability ACT (HIPAA) Project Files
series_metadata.series_description: Project files document the development, planning and implementation of policies and procedures of the committees and subcommittees administering HIPAA. Files include, but are not limited to, background documentation, committee and subcommittee titles, workgroup titles, names of team members, agendas, meeting minutes, decisions made regarding the project, reports and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office . Review by State Archives prior disposal. ; Paper: in office . Review by State Archives prior disposal
